pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py lines 105-113 check for h1.paragraph_format.page_break_before == True. Setup script lines 29-34 intentionally set this to False as the bad initial state.
Task description and verifier.py lines 115-123 check for h2.paragraph_format.keep_with_next == True. Setup script lines 36-40 intentionally set this to False as the bad initial state.
Task description and verifier.py lines 127-142 check for bt.paragraph_format.widow_control == True. Setup script lines 42-51 intentionally set this to False as the bad initial state.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic DOCX document generated at /home/ga/Documents/thesis_draft.docx using python-docx library. The document contains manual page breaks (inserted via WD_BREAK.PAGE) and three paragraph styles with incorrect settings: Heading 1 has page_break_before=False, Heading 2 has keep_with_next=False, and Body Text has widow_control=False. The agent must fix these issues and save the corrected document to /home/ga/Documents/thesis_repaired.docx. The verifier checks: (1) removal of all manual page breaks using XML XPath search for w:br[@w:type='page'], (2) Heading 1 style with page_break_before=True, (3) Heading 2 style with keep_with_next=True, and (4) Body Text style with widow_control=True. Scoring: File creation (+10), no manual breaks (+30), each corrected style (+20 each). Pass threshold is 85 points.
